allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 pi@192.168.1.14 "sudo apt-get install -y i2c-tools 2>&1 | tail -3")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 pi@192.168.1.14 "sudo raspi-config nonint do_i2c 0 && echo 'I2C enabled'")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 pi@192.168.1.14 "sudo apt update -qq 2>&1 | tail -1 && sudo apt install -y -qq alsa-utils 2>&1 | tail -3")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 pi@192.168.1.14 "echo '=== CAPTURE ===' && arecord -l && echo '=== PLAYBACK ===' && aplay -l")

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 pi@192.168.1.14 "arecord -D hw:1,0 -r 16000 -c 1 -f S16_LE -t wav -d 3 /tmp/test.wav 2>&1 && echo 'GRABACION OK' && aplay -D hw:0,0 /tmp/test.wav 2>&1 && echo 'REPRODUCCION OK'")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 pi@192.168.1.14 "arecord -D plughw:1,0 -r 16000 -c 1 -f S16_LE -t wav -d 3 /tmp/test.wav 2>&1 && echo 'GRABACION OK'")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 pi@192.168.1.14 "aplay -D plughw:0,0 /tmp/test.wav 2>&1 && echo 'REPRODUCCION OK'")
